scripts.sync:directing: PORTFOLIO_MODE=directing node scripts/sync-data.mjs && PORTFOLIO_MODE=directing node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && PORTFOLIO_MODE=directing node scripts/generate-robots.mjs
scripts.sync:postproduction: PORTFOLIO_MODE=postproduction node scripts/sync-data.mjs && PORTFOLIO_MODE=postproduction node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && PORTFOLIO_MODE=postproduction node scripts/generate-robots.mjs
scripts.sync:all: npm run sync:directing && npm run sync:postproduction
